name: Dmitri Lenko
title: Imperial Counselor
abilityWindow: When a player uses the PRODUCTION ability of one of their units:
abilityText: You may exhaust this card to set that unit's PRODUCTION value to 7 for this build.

name: Lena Zelevas
title: Heir to the Throne
abilityWindow: Whenever you gain one or more Command Tokens:
abilityText: gain that many Trade Goods.
unlockCondition: Have 12 or more Command Tokens on your sheet

name: Emperor Maximillian Zelevas
title: Emperor Forevermore
abilityWindow: At the start of the Strategy Phase:
abilityText: You may move this hero next to your Strategy Pool. During the next Action Phase, whenever you would perform the secondary ability of a Strategy Card, you may perform the primary ability instead. When you pass during that Action Phase, purge this card.

name: Hanmharla Gerzi
title: Intrepid Explorer
abilityWindow: At the start of a player's turn:
abilityText: You may exhaust this card to allow that player to ready and explore any planet with a tech specialty they control.

name: Asaroenni Dzulmaran
title: Sophon Councilwoman
permanentEffect: This card satisfies a Yellow technology requirement. Planets you control with tech specialties gain +1 to their Resource and Influence values.
unlockCondition: Have a technology with three or more prerequisites

name: ENFER
title: Sophon Super AI
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Choose a player. You may gain up to two non-faction technologies that player owns that you do not. If you own all non-faction technologies that player owns, instead they must give you two promissory notes from their hand, trade goods or commodities equal to their commodity value, and they must remove a token from their fleet pool. Then, purge this card.

name: Risto Libera
title: Bishop Tactician
abilityWindow: When a player moves ships with capacity as part of a tactical action:
abilityText: You may exhaust this card to make up to four fighters or infantry not count against capacity for the rest of this tactical action.

name: Koros Apogee
title: Slave No Longer
abilityWindow: At the end of your turn:
abilityText: If three or more units were destroyed this turn, gain a trade good.
unlockCondition: Have five or more of your units be destroyed in the same tactical action.

name: Oroyo Ner Freed
title: Craver Queen
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Place a Locust token on any planet you control other than Mecatol Rex that doesn't have a Locust token on it and isn't in a system that contains another player's ships. Then, gain X Trade Goods and produce up to X units in the space area of that system, where X is the combined Resource and Influence value of that planet. Then, purge this card.

name: Horatio
title: EM8 Series-22
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Exhaust this card, then you may spend five Resources to research a unit upgrade technology. If you don't, you may choose another player. That player may give you three trade goods to research a unit upgrade technology.

name: Horatio
title: Ruthian Series, F-11
abilityWindow: Whenever you cast votes:
abilityText: If a player has more victory points than you, cast three additional votes.

name: Horatio
title: The First
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Choose a non-home planet other than Mecatol Rex that is in the same system or a system adjacent to one of your units with BOMBARDMENT. Destroy all units on that planet. If at least three Infantry were destroyed this way, place three Infantry from your reinforcements onto that planet and gain control of it. Then, purge this card.

name: Petrov Jutka
title: Relic Librarian
abilityWindow: Whenever a player spends Resources to research a technology:
abilityText: You may exhaust this card to allow that player to shuffle a relic fragment back into the corresponding exploration deck to reduce that Resource cost by three.

name: Jyde Parcha
title: Justicar of Exploration
abilityWindow: Whenever you research a technology:
abilityText: You may explore a planet that contains your units.
unlockCondition: Have at least two victory points.

name: Opbot DV8
title: Vaulter Sentinel
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Take a number of technologies from your technology deck equal to your Fleet pool and place them, along with this card, next to your faction sheet. You may treat those technologies as if you owned them and use their abilities as if they had been researched. At the start of the next Status Phase, return all of those technologies to your technology deck and purge this card.
unlockCondition: The Auriga planet is placed on the game board

name: Enav St Lyeaor
title: Saint of Exploration
abilityWindow: At the end of a player's turn:
abilityText: You may exhaust this card to allow that player to move ships they control from any one system to their home system. If another player has ships there, resolve space combat in that system.

name: Varb St Zouieina
title: Saint of Conversion
abilityWindow: Whenever your home system or a system adjacent to your home system is activated:
abilityText: You may gain a commodity or convert one of your commodities into a trade good.
unlockCondition: Have a Legendary planet adjacent to your home system.

name: Isyara St Shaiad
title: Hierarch of the Vodyani
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Remove your command tokens from your home system, if able. Then, place this card next to the game board. Whenever you activate your home system, return the command token used to your reinforcements. The system still counts as being activated. Units you control can move out of systems with your command tokens on them if the active system is your home system. At the end of the Action Phase, purge this card.

name: Yelchin Ordara
title: The Kid
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Exhaust this card, then replenish any other player's commodities or convert all of their commodities into trade goods. That player must place an action card or promissory note from their hand face-up onto your faction sheet.

name: Jenhaestra Drev
title: The Fixer
permanentEffect: Gain +1 to your maximum commodity value for each player that has your Alliance promissory note in their play area.
unlockCondition: Use the primary or secondary ability of Trade.

name: Brunem Berto
title: The Closer
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: For each of your neighbors, choose one of that player's ships from either the board or their reinforcements, then you may make a transaction with that player. Relics, action cards, and unscored secret objectives can be given to you as part of these transactions. If no transaction was completed, capture the chosen ship. Then, purge this card.

name: Lunabarxes
title: She who Wonders
abilityWindow: When a player activates an Entangled system:
abilityText: You may exhaust this card to give all ships either +1 or -1 movement during this tactical action.

name: Anaxagoras
title: He that Shields
abilityWindow: When assigning hits during the first round of combat in which you are the defender:
abilityText: Cancel up to two of those hits.

name: Arasch
title: First of Seconds
abilityWindow: At the start of your turn:
abilityText: You may place this card next to your play area and increment the Vine Counter by 1. During this turn, you may exhaust other player's planets in Entangled Systems to pay for resource costs as if you controlled them. You cannot exhaust a planet for 0 or excess resources during this turn. At the end of this turn, purge this card.

name: Σ
title: The First Explorer
abilityWindow: At the start of a combat round:
abilityText: You may exhaust this card to have a player apply +1 to all of their combat rolls this round for each round of combat that has resolved so far during this combat.

title: The First Prophet
abilityWindow: At the start of the Status Phase:
abilityText: Gain a trade good for each exhausted non-planet component in your play area.
unlockCondition: Use your Masters of Space and Time ability.

name: π
title: The First Viceroy
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Research two technologies. Then, purge this card. If this hero is unlocked, you can use this ability even if this card is exhausted.At any time during your turn, you may exhaust this card to ready any other component in your play area.

name: Kogewa Brightblade
title: The Honorable Blade
abilityWindow: After a player rolls combat dice:
abilityText: You may exhaust this card to have a unit that player controls in that combat produce an additional hit, or you may gain one Keii.

name: Fusha Keencrest
title: Seeker of Battle
permanentEffect: When you win a space combat, if you have no ground forces in the active system, remove all command tokens from that system.

name: Senya Blackedge
title: Behemoth Engineer
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Place a War Sun from your reinforcements into any system that contains your units and no other player's ships. Then, purge this card.

name: Sila Minor
title: Chord of Discovery
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: You may exhaust this card and give another player an action card or promissory note from your hand to gain a command token.

name: Lare Staccato
title: Freedom Refrain
permanentEffect: At the end of space combat involving at least one of your ships, your opponent places a command token from their reinforcements into the active system if they don't have one there already.
unlockCondition: Win a combat against a player who has passed.

name: Imane Kryv
title: The First Contact
abilityWindow: When you activate a non-home system that contains another player's ships:
abilityText: You may pay an amount of resources or influence in any combination equal to the combined cost of all ships in that system to replace each ship in the active system with the same ship type from your reinforcements. Then, purge this card.

name: Morya Kupas
title: The Awakener
abilityWindow: Whenever a player explores a planet:
abilityText: You may exhaust this card to let that player place an infantry from their reinforcements on that planet and a destroyer from their reinforcements in the space area of that planet's system.

name: Panako Nakatug
title: Minister of the Realm
permanentEffect: Legendary planets you control gain the PRODUCTION 2 ability, and planets with attachments you control gain the PRODUCTION 1 ability. They may use these abilities as if they were units.
unlockCondition: Have a relic and a planet with an attachment.

name: Marusia Mapagna
title: Empress of the Lost
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Place the True Throne attachment on Sobra, then ready it an its legendary planet card. That planet gains +4 influence. Then, purge this card.
